title: Create: Copyfoxes
description: Create: Copycat Extension, adding copycat blocks that allow even smaller cube placement
body:
# CopyFoxies

`CopyFoxies` is an expansion mod for the **Create 0.5.1 + Copycats 2.2.1** ecosystem, focused on providing more flexible, engineering-friendly copycat geometry blocks.

## Highlights

- Adds multiple variable-geometry Copycat blocks with step-by-step right-click parameter editing.
- Complex blocks support staged placement preview (point -> line -> side) to reduce misplacement.
- Built for architectural and mechanical detailing: slopes, edge cuts, layered shapes, and centered/symmetric pieces.

## Main Block Families

- `Edge Cut Prism` / `Edge Cut Centered Prism`
  - Adjustable `U/V` cut-line positions and thickness.
  - Supports positive/negative half switching for chamfers, corner fills, and irregular transitions.
- `Horizontal Variable Slope` / `Horizontal Variable Centered Slope`
  - Adjustable top width, bottom width, and thickness for continuous slopes and directional mechanical detail.
- `Dual Half Layer` / `Dual Half Column` / `Centered Half Panel`
  - Practical base geometry for fast blockout and layered detailing.
- `Quarter Panel` / `Three Band Panel`
  - Finer panel segmentation and layered profile control.
- `Center Variable Cube` / `Corner Variable Cube`
  - Ideal for centered/corner volume tuning and structural transitions.

## Interaction Design

- Key variable-geometry blocks provide visual placement previews.
- Parameters can be increased/decreased directly on the same block, minimizing break-and-replace loops.
- Designed for intuitive click-based shape editing instead of memorizing complex workflows.

## Compatibility & Dependencies

- Minecraft: `1.20.1`
- Forge: `47.3.x`
- Create: `0.5.1.j-55`
- Copycats: `2.2.1`

> The versions above are recommended for full feature compatibility and best stability.

## Who Is This For

- Players who build high-detail structures with Copycats
- Players who need smooth geometric transitions in Create contraptions
- Pack/mod authors extending variable copycat geometry on the legacy Create stack

## Future Plans

- Expand the library of editable geometry families
- Keep improving placement previews and interaction consistency
- Control state complexity and performance cost without sacrificing usability
- Port to Create 6.0+ in approprite timing
